classic.clue: A survivor shaped by street races, engines, and refusing to stay in the lane chosen for her.
hints: She is tied to speed, independence, and a very stubborn sense of freedom.
Her story has a lot of pressure from family expectations.

classic.clue: A survivor who learned how dangerous ambition can become when fame matters more than people.
hints: Her story is tied to the music industry.
She stood very close to a rising star who became something much worse.

classic.clue: A survivor with a restless streak, a talent for slipping through places, and no interest in behaving.
hints: Her style feels more city than wilderness.
She is one of the older survivor additions.

classic.clue: A survivor whose confidence came from competition, screens, and proving she could win.
hints: Her background is tied to gaming and pressure to perform.
She has one of the most recognizable cosmetic collections.

classic.clue: A survivor drawn to stories, rituals, and something a little more mystical than most people around her understood.
hints: Her identity is strongly tied to books and witchy themes.
She brought a new kind of survivor power into the game.

classic.clue: A killer who turned attention, performance, and applause into something sharp and cruel.
hints: His style is bright, loud, and polished.
His fame is part of what makes him dangerous.

classic.clue: A killer identity built around a group, shared violence, and the kind of chaos that spreads fast.
hints: The mask is not always the same face.
Their pressure comes from moving quickly between people.

classic.clue: A killer whose pain, expression, and black-winged imagery became something the Fog could twist.
hints: Her power reaches across distance.
Her theme is tied to ink, birds, and grief.

killer.clue: This killer is not really one person, even if only one body is chasing you at a time.
hints: Their pressure gets worse when survivors are grouped up.
Their identity is shared between several names.

killer.clue: This killer treats violence like a show and the trial like a stage.
hints: His weapon pressure comes in many small hits.
His style is tied to bright performance and fame.

killer.clue: This killer makes the map feel unsafe through cursed objects that survivors cannot ignore forever.
hints: Her pressure is tied to something survivors can carry.
Screens are part of her identity.

killer.clue: This killer can turn distance into danger, especially when survivors think a wall makes them safe.
hints: Her presence can be heard before a normal chase starts.
Her aim matters more than most killers.

killer.clue: This killer can pressure survivors from far away through something that feels alive, dark, and loud.
hints: Her power is good at checking generators from distance.
Bird imagery is the key.
The middle emoji is not just decoration.
This killer is known before she is seen.
One of these emojis is part of her map pressure.
The danger spreads through something watched.
The shine is part of the persona.
Performance and blades both matter.
The first two emojis are more about her past than the trial.
She is tied to speed and independence.
This survivor feels more mystical than most.
Books and rituals fit her theme.

perk.clue: A fast movement reward after using the environment well.
hints: It is tied to a rushed vault.
It is an exhaustion perk.

perk.clue: A late-generator mistake can suddenly make progress feel much less safe.
hints: It appears when a generator is close to done.
It creates a chain of difficult skill checks.

perk.clue: A damaged object can turn into information about where the killer is.
hints: This perk rewards paying attention to killer actions.
Generator kicks are one of the main triggers.

perk.clue: A hiding place becomes a weapon if the timing is right.
hints: It needs a locker.
It can stun the killer.
This is not a normal playable character.
It is bigger than the killers.
This is tied to a licensed chapter.
The trial version uses traps in a very specific way.
This is not asking for a character.
The answer is a survivor perk.

lore.clue: A performer whose hunger for attention slowly became impossible to separate from cruelty.
hints: His public image mattered a lot.
Music and blades both fit him.

lore.clue: A survivor pushed by expectations, but drawn toward speed, risk, and proving herself on her own terms.
hints: Her story has strong independence themes.
Racing is part of her background.

lore.clue: A creator marked by grief and violence, whose expression became inseparable from black-winged imagery.
hints: Her story is tied to art and trauma.
Birds are the strongest symbol.

lore.clue: A storyteller with an interest in old rituals, strange energy, and things most people would dismiss.
hints: She has a witchy theme.
Her gameplay impact is tied to Boons.
